text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
An alluring aroma draws me into a<n>ramen shop on
my day off. After<n>passing through the door, I spot
a<n>familiar face.

Running away, are you? Whilst the<n>battle for the
crown is yet to be<n>concluded?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The question begs its answer—who<n>among us two
lords is to be crowned<n>the Ramen King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You are not listening! I'm telling you<n>that speed
eating ramen is beneath<n>kingly conduct!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: However... I cannot ignore your<n>brazen words!

I'll give you the honor of a personal<n>lesson! No
matter the contest... I am<n>the true king of kings!

Hah... Allow me to demonstrate the<n>difference
between you and I. For I<n>am the Overlord... the lord
of all kings!
choice_data_list: Why am I not recording this?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! Come to spectate on this<n>kingly
contest, have you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Burn this moment into your<n>memory, for
it will be the moment I<n>conquer all to become the
unquestioned sovereign!
choice_data_list: You two should bring out that fervor in a race!

text_block_list.text:
You know how to stoke the<n>competitive fire.
...What do you say,<n>King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I say you're on. We'll continue this<n>on the track!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Like the steam from a bowl of cooling<n>ramen, their
combative tension<n>curiously fades.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Victory... shall be mine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, their speed eating contest to<n>decide the
king of kings gets<n>underway.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sluuurp! Gulp! By one topping, I amvic—augh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch. Ohohoho! That iswhat happens when you overdo—ngh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: THUD!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They've pushed their stomachs to<n>the limit,
collapsing as a result. Just<n>as I'm wondering how
I'm going to<n>roll them both out of here...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Chef! Another two bowls for the<n>Ramen King
contest, please! ♪

text_block_list.name: The Two Vying Kings
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I stare absentmindedly into the<n>distance, I
realize that even at the top,<n>there is always
someone better.
